issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
Installation instructions omit Windows support, limiting cross-platform coverage.

scenarios.name: Batch generate 200x200 center-cropped thumbnails
scenarios.rationale: Baseline typically uses plain `-resize 200x200` which letterboxes or distorts; treatment combines `-resize 200x200^` with `-gravity center -extent 200x200` in a for-loop writing to thumbnails/, matching the documented fill-then-crop recipe.

scenarios.name: Build a 1200x630 OG image with gradient and centered text
scenarios.rationale: Baseline scripts two-stage backgrounds or external tools; treatment renders the card in a single `magick -size 1200x630 gradient:...` command using `-font`, `-pointsize`, `-gravity center`, and stacked `-annotate +0-50` / `+0+30` calls.
